# AutoHDR Documentation

> AutoHDR is an AI-powered photo editing service for real estate professionals. Upload photos, get studio-quality results in minutes, pay only for downloads.

## Getting Started
- [Quickstart](/quickstart): Edit your first photos in under 5 minutes
- [Create Account](/getting-started/create-account): Sign up and get 10 free photos
- [Upload Photos](/getting-started/upload-photos): Photo requirements and upload methods
- [Download Results](/getting-started/download-results): Preview, compare, and download

## Editing Services
- [HDR Editing](/features/hdr-editing): Standard real estate photo enhancement
- [Flambient Editing](/features/flambient-editing): Flash + ambient blend
- [Day to Dusk](/features/day-to-dusk): Transform daytime exteriors to twilight
- [Virtual Staging](/features/virtual-staging): AI-furnished empty rooms
- [Object Removal](/features/object-removal): Remove unwanted items
- [Grass Greening](/features/grass-greening): Enhance lawn appearance
- [TV Blackout](/features/tv-blackout): Black out TV screens

## Pricing & Billing
- [Pricing](/pricing): Credit-based pricing, only pay for downloads
- [Billing](/account/billing): Manage subscription and payment methods

## Integrations
- [Overview](/integrations/overview): All supported integrations
- [Spiro](/integrations/spiro): Spiro connection setup
- [Dropbox](/integrations/dropbox): Dropbox sync setup
- [Slack](/integrations/slack): Documentation updates via Slack bot

## Help
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions answered
- [Support](/support): Contact email, phone, Slack
